'''thataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squame|squame]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-t-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squame|squame]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thataka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thætækæth|thætækæth]] || [[word:thætækæj|thætækæj]] || [[word:thætækæsh|thætækæsh]] || [[word:thætækæ|thætækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatatakath|thatatakath]] || [[word:thatatakaj|thatatakaj]] || [[word:thatatakash|thatatakash]] || [[word:thatataka|thatataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatakath|thatakath]] || [[word:thatakaj|thatakaj]] || [[word:thatakash|thatakash]] || [[word:thataka|thataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatafkath|thatafkath]] || [[word:thatafkaj|thatafkaj]] || [[word:thatafkash|thatafkash]] || [[word:thatafkaf|thatafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thatakatha|thatakatha]] || [[word:thatakaja|thatakaja]] || [[word:thatakasha|thatakasha]] || [[word:thatakaka|thatakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thatakath|thatakath]] || [[word:thatakaj|thatakaj]] || [[word:thatakash|thatakash]] || [[word:thataka|thataka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thatakathal|thatakathal]] || [[word:thatakajal|thatakajal]] || [[word:thatakashal|thatakashal]] || [[word:thatakakal|thatakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thatakathatha|thatakathatha]] || [[word:thatakajaja|thatakajaja]] || [[word:thatakashasha|thatakashasha]] || [[word:thatakaka|thatakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thatakathan|thatakathan]] || [[word:thatakajan|thatakajan]] || [[word:thatakashan|thatakashan]] || [[word:thatakakan|thatakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thatakathaoro|thatakathaoro]] || [[word:thatakajaoro|thatakajaoro]] || [[word:thatakashaoro|thatakashaoro]] || [[word:thatakakaoro|thatakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
